programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Tyler Bass made a tiebreaking 45-yard field goal with two seconds left after missing an extra point late in the fourth quarter, lifting Buffalo to a 28-25 win over Detroit on Thursday.

programme.title: NFL Media Originals

programme.desc: NFL Media Draft expert and former scout Daniel Jeremiah leads a masterclass on NFL Draft prospect scouting, from reviewing college game film to analyzing NFL Scouting Combine and Pro Day performances.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to go low in the scoring zone. Learn to stick wedge shots with lessons on solid contact, swing path, trajectory control, and distance control. Martin also shares wedge play advice from Open Champion Shane Lowry.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to hit the driver longer and straighter. Learn tips used by Rory McIlroy, Ernie Els, John Daly and more of the game's best all-around drivers. Martin also reveals how to setup for success on the tee.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal reveal what to learn from the game's greatest Texans.Martin teaches a swing move of solid contact used by Byron Nelson, Ben Hogan,Lee Trevino, and Scottie Scheffler.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Playing Downwind and Into the Wind
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty breaks down the art of playing downwind and into the wind. Nick will guide you through techniques to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust your club selection to take full advantage of the wind.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Right to Left Left to Right
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty teaches techniques and tips for achieving excellent golf performance when playing into the wind. He shows how to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust club selection to make the most of the weather conditions.

programme.title: Golf's Top Instructors
programme.desc: In part 1, Jim joins Devan to share how to maximize power with driver, create all sorts of different trajectories with your irons, and putt like a pro.

programme.title: Golf's Top Instructors
programme.desc: In part 2, Jim joins Devan to share invaluable wisdom and game-saving tips from his years around the game in order to help you shoot your lowest scores ever.

programme.title: The Big Break

programme.title: The Big Break

programme.title: The Big Break

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Contestants try to imitate PGA Tour star Phil Mickelson's talent of shooting the ball virtually straight up in the air, the extreme flop shot.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The skills challenge forces the golfers to choose the shots they believe will deliver the biggest payoff.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The six remaining golfers have to show their speed in this team skills challenge, but they can't forget accuracy.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The number of contestants has been cut in half, with five remaining; the skills challenge may be the most familiar challenge for the players yet, but they may not perform like they expect.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: With four contestants remaining, each is partnered for a team skills challenge.

programme.sub-title: Wedge for Show, Putt for Dough

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The two remaining contestants face off against each other in a realistic tournament situation.

programme.desc: A Pee.S.A that takes on cheaters in charity golf scrambles; how surfers and skateboarders are changing golf.

programme.title: Dredd
programme.desc: In a violent, futuristic metropolis, a law-enforcement officer (Karl Urban) and his rookie trainee (Olivia Thirlby) become caught up in a high-stakes conflict with a vicious prostitute-turned-drug lord (Lena Headey).

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: A veteran detective and a rookie cop have to stop a master thief's computer virus before it drains all the funds from a bank's accounts.

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: Joey, an alcoholic war veteran assumes a new identity after returning from a traumatic tour in Afghanistan and becomes a vigilante in a bid to atone for his sins.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: A young girl whose memory holds a priceless numerical code, finds herself pursued. Coming to her aid is an ex-cage fighter whose life was destroyed by the gangsters on Mei's trail.

programme.title: Killer Elite
programme.desc: A formidable special-ops agent (Jason Statham) must cut his way through a team of assassins to rescue his kidnapped mentor (Robert De Niro).
A desperate man takes part in an underworld game of Russian roulette in which gamblers place bets on who will survive.

programme.title: Bleeding Steel
programme.desc: Hong Kong police inspector Lin Dong learns that a biochemical invention has been surgically implanted into his missing daughter. With help from a hacker, Lin tries to connect the dots between the device, a sinister army and a strange phenomenon.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno, Bobby and Cheyenne (Lorenzo Lamas, Branscombe Richmond, Kathleen Kinmont) escort a paroled rapist (Christopher Rich) to a new town where Reno decides to investigate the man's claims of innocence.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno seeks the help of a legendary bounty hunter in capturing a notorious criminal who has taken a girl hostage.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno becomes exasperated while trying to protect a wealthy woman who witnessed the killing of a loan shark's late-paying customer.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: While searching for a stalker, Reno falls in love with a country singer and considers changing his profession.

programme.title: Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: Warrior He-Man (Dolph Lundgren) and his sidekicks seek a cosmic key to free a sorceress from Skeletor (Frank Langella).

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: A 13-year-old clairvoyant (Dakota Fanning) and the son (Chris Evans) of a murdered assassin join forces against a covert government agency that dabbles in psychic drugs and warfare.

programme.title: Precious Cargo
programme.desc: To get back in the good graces of her murderous boss (Bruce Willis), a seductive thief (Claire Forlani) recruits an ex-lover (Mark-Paul Gosselaar) to steal rare and valuable gems.

programme.title: The Spirit
programme.desc: A ghostlike crime fighter (Gabriel Macht) faces a villain known as the Octopus (Samuel L. Jackson), whose aim is to destroy Central City while searching for the secret to immortality.

programme.title: Killing Them Softly
programme.desc: After a rival crook hires a pair of bumbling thieves (Scoot McNairy, Ben Mendelsohn) to rob their card game, mobsters hire a reluctant hit man (Brad Pitt) to settle the score.

programme.title: Killing Them Softly
programme.desc: After a rival crook hires a pair of bumbling thieves (Scoot McNairy, Ben Mendelsohn) to rob their card game, mobsters hire a reluctant hit man (Brad Pitt) to settle the score.

programme.title: The Asian Connection
